response.justification: Szabo meets the baseline 15+ years of software engineering experience and brings relevant current AI infrastructure work at Stripe. However, the role requires director-level strategic leadership and recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products, neither of which are clearly evident. His background shows strong individual contributor capabilities across technologies, but the AI work appears infrastructure-focused and recent rather than reflecting the strategic differentiation and product-building depth the role demands. The lack of a Master's/PhD in AI and limited evidence of advisory/strategic partnership work at scale are significant gaps for this director-level position.
strengths: 18+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, systems, and currently AI infrastructure—exceeds baseline requirement
Current role at Stripe involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly relevant to AI strategy focus
Demonstrated full-stack polyglot capability and builder mentality across multiple languages, frameworks, and platforms
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; AI expertise appears recent (current role) rather than longstanding or deeply specialized
Resume lacks evidence of recognized AI products or platforms built independently; AI work is infrastructure/tooling-focused rather than strategic product-level
No clear track record of strategic advisory work with customers/partners or director-level leadership; primarily individual contributor roles throughout career
